description: Central bank announces an increase in key interest rates, typically bullish for currency
Central bank announces a decrease in key interest rates, typically bearish for currency

event_name: Central Bank Holds Rates with Hawkish Stance
description: Central bank maintains current rates but signals potential future increases

event_name: Central Bank Holds Rates with Dovish Stance
description: Central bank maintains current rates but signals potential future decreases
